title: ctenopteris melanotrichia
intro: Ctenopteris melanotrichia, also known as the Black-veined fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris melanotrichia include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to apply the plant's medicinal properties topically or internally.
